item.title: mlverney: Michael Verney @mlverney · 1h Cita Mark Carter @MarkLewisCarter · 12 abr. If Spurs do go down, it’s inevitable that play
item.description: Michael Verney @mlverney · 1h Cita Mark Carter @MarkLewisCarter · 12 abr. If Spurs do go down, it’s inevitable that players will be leaving in the summer. But my question is, how much is Udogie in the window? 233

item.title: BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 1h Niall Currie exits Shamrock Park with the Ports 10th in the table, but with their Irish Pr
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 1h Niall Currie exits Shamrock Park with the Ports 10th in the table, but with their Irish Premiership status secure, eight points clear of the promotion/relegation play-off place with two games remaining.
#BBCFootball #BBCIrishPrem 1 1 1 mil

item.title: willocallaghan: Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 2h Hope I’m wrong, but fully expecting Eddie Hearn to come out of these talks saying
item.description:
Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 2h Hope I’m wrong, but fully expecting Eddie Hearn to come out of these talks saying a deal couldn’t be reached, and he tried everything etc
Can’t see Croke Park dropping their price, nor the government funding to minimise the risk for Matchroom. 2 14 4 mil

item.title:
LaobhaoiseNihE: Score Beo reposteó L. NíhEanacháin @LaobhaoiseNihE · 5h Cracking goal from the brilliant Kobe McDonald. @MayoGAA
#may
item.description:
Score Beo reposteó L. NíhEanacháin @LaobhaoiseNihE · 5h Cracking goal from the brilliant Kobe McDonald. @MayoGAA
